items.title: Former KU guard Gradey Dick of Wichita sent to L.A. Clippers in NBA trade: report
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Former KU guard Gradey Dick of Wichita sent to L.A. Clippers in NBA trade: report Yahoo Sports

items.title: If the LA Clippers clear the decks of FA cap holds and non-guaranteed salaries, they can create over $31M in cap space this summer. They got off some money by trading Kawhi Leonard to the Toronto Raptors for Brandon Ingram and Gradey Dick.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt: If the LA Clippers clear the decks of FA cap holds and non-guaranteed salaries, they can create over $31M in cap space this summer. They got off some money by trading Kawhi Leonard to the Toronto Raptors for Brandon Ingram and Gradey Dick.

items.title: Clippers' Gradey Dick: Reportedly heading to Los Angeles
items.author: CBS Sports

items.title: [Charania] BREAKING: The Los Angeles Clippers are nearing deal sending Kawhi Leonard to the Toronto Raptors for Brandon Ingram, Gradey Dick, 2 first-round picks, 1 pick swap and 2 second-rounders, sources tell ESPN. A return to Canada for the Raptors champion and two-time Finals MVP.
items.author: curryybacon

items.title: It's not the most important thing by any means, but I did find myself last night yearning for a Gradey Dick bedazzled jacket, or a Steph Castle iced-out castle chain, or "the camera finds a Hawks fan chugging beer oddly." The first round all just felt kind of ... matter-of-fact?
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: It's not the most important thing by any means, but I did find myself last night yearning for a Gradey Dick bedazzled jacket, or a Steph Castle iced-out castle chain, or "the camera finds a Hawks fan chugging beer oddly." The first round all just felt kind of ... matter-of-fact?
